training_status: was sedentary for 10 years, now training 1.5 hours per day 5 days per week
health_conditions: history of severe DOMS after returning to training

benefits.description: Severe DOMS pain went away, now experiences normal post-lifting soreness and can train 5 days in a row

protocol_notes: Transitioned from 1x 1-hour PT session per week with excruciating DOMS to 1.5 hours per day, 5 days per week. High pain threshold. Attributes body composition changes partly to increased conditioning and partly to peptide effects. Reports noticing difference when not taking peptides.
